# Guardian of PHAN THIET

> Interactive travel guide for Phan Thiet temples in Vietnam.

## Commands
- [Setup](README.md): npm install
- [Dev](README.md): npm run dev
- [Build](README.md): npm run build
- [Test](README.md): npm run test
- [Lint](README.md): npm run lint

## Docs
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Agent guidelines and code style

## Code
- [Components](src/components/): React UI components
- [UI](src/ui/): shadcn/ui components (Button, Card, Dialog, Sheet, Sonner)
- [Types](src/types.ts): TypeScript definitions
- [Constants](src/constants.ts): Temple data
- [Services](src/services/): Gemini API integration
- [Utils](src/utils/): IndexedDB helpers (db.ts)
